summary.concern: Stephanie and Marc Felton — 13 overdue tasks

paragraphs: Still holding at 68 overdue — the backlog isn't shrinking. This is above the 7-day average of 62 — the trend is heading the wrong direction. 21 tasks are actively in progress — that's solid execution across the board. 2 tasks should be active but are stuck waiting on blockers — these need immediate attention.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** The oldest overdue task is 28 days past due with 13 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **7 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $16,030 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** The oldest overdue task is 25 days past due with 13 total — this has been stuck for days. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **5 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $10,568 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** The oldest overdue task is 14 days past due with 12 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **6 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 3 payment tasks due this week.

**Ginger Brown:** The oldest overdue task is 16 days past due with 10 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **13 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 3 payment tasks due this week.

**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** The oldest overdue task is 7 days past due with 9 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **9 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** The oldest overdue task is 16 days past due with 7 total — this has been stuck for days. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **3 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** The oldest overdue task is 17 days past due with 4 total — this has been stuck for days. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **13 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

118 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **58 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 45 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$36,685 in payments going out this week** across 19 tasks — make sure funds are available. $12,780 expected in from 2 client payments. Heavy week ahead for Ginger Brown and Katie Holmes & Sean Springs — make sure resources are lined up.

Angel Pacheco: Angel Pacheco is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 23. Keep the momentum going.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 13 overdue (oldest: 25d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **5 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 21 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** 12 overdue (oldest: 14d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. 1 active-blocked — clear the blockers to keep moving. **6 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 18 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** 7 overdue (oldest: 16d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. 1 task blocked by payments — escalate, not on you. **3 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 12 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**CANDACE - JUSTIN P REFERRAL (CNG2025-522):** 2 payment tasks need Operations attention.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
